"CWE-287", "name": "Improper Authentication"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

Remote onboarding accepted discovered gateway endpoints without an explicit trust confirmation before persisting the remote URL and connection details.

## Impact

A malicious or spoofed discovery endpoint could steer onboarding toward an attacker-controlled gateway and capture future gateway credentials or traffic.

## Affected Component

`src/commands/onboard-remote.ts`

## Fixed Versions

- Affected: `<= 2026.3.24`
- Patched: `>= 2026.3.28`
- Latest stable `2026.3.28` contains the fix.

## Fix

Fixed by commit `d6affb17d8` (`CLI: confirm discovered remote gateways before saving config`).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00126, "percentile": 0.02597}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3cw3-5vxw-g2h3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-31T23:51:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3cw3-5vxw-g2h3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3cw3-5vxw-g2h3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41342"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-31T23:51:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-3cw3-5vxw-g2h3", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/d6affb17d85f5f5ab08ef9f2b994b257af12e75a", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41342", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-unauthenticated-discovery-endpoint-credential-exfiltration-via-remote-onboarding", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3cw3-5vxw-g2h3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-3cw3-5vxw-g2h3", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: CLI Remote Onboarding Persists Unauthenticated Discovery Endpoint and Exfiltrates Gateway Credentials", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T18:13:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3cw3-5vxw-g2h3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.24"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: CLI Remote Onboarding Persists Unauthenticated Discovery Endpoint and Exfiltrates Gateway Credentials
